description_long: This is a polygonal, blue-toned bottled water container with a faceted cylindrical body and a slightly tapered neck leading to a flat, round, light gray cap. The bottle features a wide, white horizontal label wrapping around its midsection, with bold black text in a modern, sans-serif font. The text on the label reads 'HYDRATE BITCH', with the words split across the front and back of the bottle. The bottle's body is segmented into vertical facets, giving it a geometric, stylized appearance. The cap appears to be a standard screw-on type, matching the bottle's color scheme. The overall design is simple yet visually striking, suitable for urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or gyms.
description: A blue, faceted bottled water with a white label reading 'HYDRATE BITCH' in bold black letters and a flat gray screw cap. The design is geometric and modern, with a prominent label and a simple color palette.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue bottle with a white label and the bold black text 'BITCH' prominently displayed.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the transition between the words on the label, with only partial letters visible and the faceted bottle shape clear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the start of the label text 'HYDRA', with the bottle's geometric facets and cap visible.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the text 'DRATE B' on the label, highlighting the wraparound nature of the label and the bottle's polygonal form.
attribute_label_or_branding: A wide, white horizontal label wraps around the bottle's midsection, featuring bold, black, all-caps text in a modern sans-serif font. The text reads 'HYDRATE BITCH', with the words split across the front and back. No logos or symbols are present.
attribute_cap_type: Screw cap; flat, round, and light gray in color, with a simple cylindrical shape and no visible ridges or tamper-evident features.
attribute_transparency: The bottle is opaque with no visible transparency, and the fill level or contents are not visible through the material.
attribute_bottle_neck_design: The neck is short and slightly tapered, smoothly transitioning from the faceted body to the cap, with no visible ridges or threads on the exterior.
